    1. log(double, String, String, double, String, double, Map)
    2. log(double, String, String, double, String, double, Map, String)

インタフェース CombatLogSink

既知の実装クラスのリスト:
VisualLoggerSink
public interface CombatLogSink
Abstraction for writing timeline-style combat logs during a simulation run.

This isolates the simulator from any specific logging backend so callers can substitute a different sink for tests, analysis, or alternate report pipelines.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    default void
    log(double time, String actor, String action, double damage, String reactionType, double reactionDamage, Map<Element,Double> enemyAura)
    Writes a combat log record without an attached formula string.
    void
    log(double time, String actor, String action, double damage, String reactionType, double reactionDamage, Map<Element,Double> enemyAura, String formula)
    Writes a combat log record, optionally including a damage-formula debug string.

  • メソッドの詳細

    • log

      default void log(double time, String actor, String action, double damage, String reactionType, double reactionDamage, Map<Element,Double> enemyAura)
      Writes a combat log record without an attached formula string.
      パラメータ:
      time - simulation time in seconds
      actor - actor or synthetic source name
      action - action or event label
      damage - primary damage value for the record
      reactionType - reaction label, or "None" if not applicable
      reactionDamage - additional reaction damage associated with the record
      enemyAura - snapshot of the enemy aura map at the time of logging

    • log

      void log(double time, String actor, String action, double damage, String reactionType, double reactionDamage, Map<Element,Double> enemyAura, String formula)
      Writes a combat log record, optionally including a damage-formula debug string.
      パラメータ:
      time - simulation time in seconds
      actor - actor or synthetic source name
      action - action or event label
      damage - primary damage value for the record
      reactionType - reaction label, or "None" if not applicable
      reactionDamage - additional reaction damage associated with the record
      enemyAura - snapshot of the enemy aura map at the time of logging
      formula - optional formula debug text, or null
